examples.explanation:
The partition will be the following to get the largest sum: [1, 15, 7 | 9 | 2, 5, 10]. 
After replacing the elements of each subarray with its maximum, the array will look like this: [15,15,15,9,10,10,10] and the sum will be 84.
Partition as [2,2 | 2,2]; each sub-arrayâs max is 2. The array stays [2,2,2,2] and the sum is 8.
